description_long: This is a mid-sized, rectangular apartment building with a pinkish facade and a dark, hipped roof. The building features three visible stories, each lined with symmetrically arranged windows, and the ground floor includes a prominent main entrance. Small trees and shrubs are positioned on either side of the entrance, adding greenery to the otherwise urban structure. The windows are evenly spaced and appear to be of similar size, contributing to a balanced and orderly appearance. The building sits on a gray paved base, which likely represents a sidewalk or entry plaza. The overall design is simple and functional, with minimal decorative elements, reflecting a practical urban residential style.
description: A three-story pink apartment building with a dark hipped roof, symmetrical windows, and a central entrance flanked by greenery on a paved base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, and landscaping on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view with visible windows, greenery on the left, and the paved base extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view with evenly spaced windows and minimal landscaping, no visible entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with windows and a small tree on the right, showing the paved base.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are symmetrically arranged in evenly spaced rows and columns across all visible facades, creating a balanced and orderly appearance.
